title: Bridge Essay: Bodily ownership and self-location: components of bodily self-consciousness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.

**Bodily ownership and self-location: components of bodily self-consciousness.**. Conscious Cogn.. PMID: 24025475. DOI: 10.1016/j.concog.2013.08.013. Recent research on bodily self-consciousness has assumed that it consists of three distinct components: the experience of owning abody (body ownership); the experience of being abody with agiven location within the environment (self-location); and the experience of taking afirst-person, body-centered, perspective on that environment (perspective).
